title: Fix Discord threading bugs in plugin

log.context: Fix Discord threading bugs in plugin

log.message: Fixes committed to /mnt/data/discord-plugin as commit 3cc8f71 ('fix: inject is_thread passthrough + thread auto-join') at 2026-03-24 15:46:58 UTC — 43 seconds after task started. Both is_thread passthrough and thread auto-join were implemented and committed.
